tools.title: Be A Lucky Block

whatIs.title: What is
whatIs.description: Be a Lucky Block is a Roblox simulator where you travel farther for better luck, survive the trip home, and convert Brainrots into passive cash for your base.

features.title: Distance-Based Luck
features.description: Farther destinations improve your odds, but every extra step makes the return more dangerous.

features.title: Brainrot Economy
features.description: Bring Brainrots home to build passive income that keeps running even while you are offline.

features.title: Steal, Escape, Upgrade
features.description: Each run is a loop of chasing higher luck, escaping guards, and reinvesting into better routes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for new and returning Be a Lucky Block players

questions.question: How often does Be a Lucky Block update?
questions.answer: The game advertises a weekly Saturday update schedule.

questions.question: What do farther destinations do?
questions.answer: Farther destinations give you better luck, which means stronger pull potential if you can make it back home.

questions.question: Why do Brainrots matter?
questions.answer: Brainrots are your base economy. Once secured at home, they keep earning cash for you, including while you are offline.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes?
questions.answer: Open the Shop menu, go to the Codes section, enter the code, and press Verify.

questions.question: What happens after the guards roll the Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Once the Lucky Block is rolled, you need to escape back to base before the guards catch you.

questions.question: Where should I track new codes and updates first?
questions.answer: Watch the Saturday patch cycle, Roblox event pages, and the official Discord for the fastest announcement flow.

questions.question: What code should I use first?
questions.answer: The current starter code covered on the homepage is RELEASE, which gives Brr Brr Patapim.

resetPlanner.title: Be a Lucky Block

decisions.question: Core stats feel misallocated?
decisions.yesAction: Check if you have a stats-reset code available
decisions.noAction: Check if Breathing/Demon Art is off-meta for your goal

decisions.question: Do you have a stats-reset code available?
decisions.yesAction: Use Stats Reset Now - Apply reset, then rebuild around your target mode (PvE/PvP/Hybrid)
decisions.noAction: Delay Reset and Farm Resources - Use active spin/yen codes and progression route first

decisions.question: Breathing/Demon Art is off-meta for your goal?
decisions.yesAction: Can you use a breathing/demon-art reset code now?
decisions.noAction: Keep Build, Optimize Execution - Focus on controls mastery before rerolling

decisions.question: Can you use a breathing/demon-art reset code now?
decisions.yesAction: Use Breathing/Demon Art Reset - Known reset examples include resets that can also affect race
decisions.noAction: Do Not Panic Reset - Wait for next milestone/update code drop; track Discord announcements
